title: Patient login with valid credentials redirects to Dashboard
description: Verifies a patient can log in using valid email/password and is redirected to the protected dashboard.

title: Patient login with incorrect password shows authentication error
description: Verifies login fails with an incorrect password and an authentication error is shown on the login page.

title: Patient registration creates account and lands on Dashboard
description: Verifies a new patient can register and is redirected to the protected dashboard after successful registration.

title: Doctor registration shows success message
description: Verifies a doctor can submit the doctor registration form and sees a registration success message.

steps.description: Type "Dr Test" into the full name field

title: Login form validation: submit with empty fields shows required indicators
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission and shows required-field feedback when submitted empty.

title: Registration form validation: submit with missing required fields shows errors
description: Verifies the patient registration form shows validation errors when required fields are missing.

title: Login with non-existent user shows authentication error
description: Verifies login fails for an unrecognized email and an authentication error is displayed.

title: Authenticated navigation: after login, user can reach Booking page from Dashboard UI
description: Verifies that after successful login, the user can access another protected area (Booking) via in-app navigation.

steps.description: Click on "Booking" in the main navigation menu

title: Save health profile with valid inputs and see risk assessment summary
description: Verifies a user can update baseline health metrics and receives a visible risk assessment summary after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Cancel edit does not change displayed health profile summary
description: Verifies exiting the edit flow without saving leaves the visible profile summary unchanged.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Reject non-numeric height input
description: Verifies the form shows a visible error or blocks saving when height contains non-numeric characters.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Reject zero or negative weight input
description: Verifies the form prevents saving and shows a visible validation message when weight is not a positive value.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Risk assessment updates after changing HbA1c to a higher value
description: Verifies the risk assessment summary visibly changes after saving a significantly different HbA1c value.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Dashboard loads and displays health summary charts
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see the health summary charts/metrics overview.

steps.description: Verify element "health summary charts" is visible

title: Open weight metric details from the dashboard
description: Verifies the user can click the weight metric on the dashboard and reach a visible weight history/details view.

title: Dashboard provides navigation to the Health Roadmap
description: Verifies the user can navigate from the dashboard to the roadmap using an in-page navigation control.

title: Dashboard charts render after initial load
description: Verifies charts are not stuck in a loading state and render visible chart content for the authenticated user.

steps.description: Wait for element "health summary charts" to be visible
Verify element "health summary charts" is visible
Verify text "No data" is not visible

title: Dashboard shows weight and height metrics in the metrics grid
description: Verifies key metric tiles (weight and height) are visible on the dashboard metrics grid.

title: NutriScan guardrail: Analyze button blocked when no image is uploaded
description: Verifies the user cannot run analysis until an image is provided.

steps.description: Click on the "Vision" or "NutriScan" navigation item
Verify text prompting to upload an image is visible

title: View article details from the Educational Hub list
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open an article from the Education list and see full content.

steps.description: Click on "Education" in the main navigation/menu
Click on an article in the article list
Verify full article content is visible

title: Educational Hub shows a browsable article list
description: Verifies the Educational Hub renders an article list that the user can browse/scroll.

steps.description: Click on "Education" in the main navigation/menu
Verify an article list is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the article list

title: Handle article load failure with error and retry
description: Verifies that if an article fails to load, the user sees an error message and a retry option.

steps.description: Click on "Education" in the main navigation/menu
Click on an article in the article list
Verify text "Failed to load" is visible
Verify full article content is visible

title: Save an article to Favorites from the article view
description: Verifies a user can save an opened article to Favorites and sees a confirmation message.

steps.description: Click on "Education" in the main navigation/menu
Click on an article in the article list

title: Prevent duplicate saves (Save to Favorites twice)
description: Verifies clicking Save to Favorites repeatedly does not create a confusing or contradictory UI state.

steps.description: Click on "Education" in the main navigation/menu
Click on an article in the article list
Verify text "Already in favorites" is visible

title: Article view displays key reading UI elements
description: Verifies an opened article shows a readable title and body content area.

steps.description: Click on "Education" in the main navigation/menu
Click on an article in the article list
Verify an article title is visible
Verify full article content is visible

title: Send a message to the floating AI chat and receive a response (Dashboard)
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open the floating AI chat on the dashboard, send a message, and see an AI response appear.

steps.description: Type "What are healthy snack options for prediabetes?" into the chat message input
Verify an AI response message is visible in the chat conversation

title: Floating chat icon is available on key authenticated pages (smoke coverage)
description: Verifies the floating chat entry point is visible on multiple key authenticated pages.

steps.description: Verify the floating chat icon is visible
Verify the floating chat icon is visible

title: Chat can be opened and closed without sending a message
description: Verifies the user can open the floating chat, see the conversation UI, and close it without side effects.

steps.description: Verify the chat panel is visible
Verify the chat panel is not visible

title: Send with empty input is prevented and shows a visible validation hint
description: Verifies the chat does not send an empty message and shows a visible hint or keeps Send disabled.

steps.description: Verify text "Type a message" is visible

title: Complete online consultation booking and payment from Doctor Discovery
description: Verifies a patient can find a doctor, book an appointment time, proceed to payment, and see a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Doctors" navigation link/menu item

title: Search for doctors and open a doctor detail/selection view
description: Verifies doctor search filters the list and a doctor can be selected to begin booking.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Doctors" navigation link/menu item
Type "Diabetes" into the doctor search field
Verify element "doctor results list" is visible

title: Start booking from a selected doctor and reach the Booking page
description: Verifies the user can select a doctor and click book to reach the booking flow.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Doctors" navigation link/menu item
Click on the first doctor card in the results

title: Select appointment time and proceed to Payment page
description: Verifies selecting a time slot allows proceeding to the payment step.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Booking" navigation link/menu item
Click on an available appointment time slot

title: Payment page loads and shows payment UI for consultation
description: Verifies the payment page is reachable from booking and shows payment controls.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Booking" navigation link/menu item

title: Unavailable time slot shows an error and user can choose another time
description: Verifies the booking flow handles a time slot that becomes unavailable and allows selecting an alternate slot.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Doctors" navigation link/menu item
Click on a doctor from the results
Click on an appointment time slot that is shown as available

title: Attach image entry point is present on Booking page
description: Verifies the booking page offers an attach-image action for adding context.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on the "Booking" navigation link/menu item

title: Complete a roadmap task and see progress update with milestone unlock
description: Verifies a user can complete a task from the Roadmap and that the UI reflects updated progress and any milestone unlock state.

title: Roadmap shows a visible task list on load
description: Verifies the Roadmap page loads and displays a task list section the user can interact with.

title: Open a task from the Roadmap task list to view its details
description: Verifies a task in the Roadmap can be opened, showing task detail content and completion controls.

steps.description: Click a visible task item in the task list

title: Mark a task complete from the task details view
description: Verifies completing a task from its detail view updates the task’s status to completed.

steps.description: Click a visible task item in the task list

title: Progress visualization updates after completing a task
description: Verifies that the Roadmap progress indicator (percent/bar/ring) updates after a task is marked complete.

steps.description: Click a visible task item in the task list

title: Milestone unlock is shown after progress threshold is reached
description: Verifies that after completing a task, the UI can show a milestone unlock indication when applicable.

steps.description: Click a visible task item in the task list

title: View transaction history list with existing transactions
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open Transaction History and see a visible list of past transactions.

steps.description: Click the "Transaction History" / "Riwayat Transaksi" navigation item
Verify text "Transaction History" or "Riwayat Transaksi" is visible

title: Open a transaction to view details and receipt
description: Verifies that a user can select a transaction from the list and view its details including receipt information.

steps.description: Click the "Transaction History" / "Riwayat Transaksi" navigation item
Click the first transaction item in the transactions list

title: Transaction details show key fields after selecting a transaction
description: Verifies that transaction detail view presents key information (status, amount, date) visibly to the user.

steps.description: Click the "Transaction History" / "Riwayat Transaksi" navigation item
Click a transaction item that appears in the list

title: Empty state shown when user has no transactions
description: Verifies that Transaction History shows an empty state message with guidance when no transactions exist.

steps.description: Click the "Transaction History" / "Riwayat Transaksi" navigation item
Verify an empty state message indicating no transactions is visible

title: Empty state provides guidance to book a consultation
description: Verifies that the empty state includes visible guidance that points the user to booking consultations.

steps.description: Click the "Transaction History" / "Riwayat Transaksi" navigation item
Verify text "book" or "booking" or "konsultasi" is visible

title: Navigate from empty state guidance to Booking page (if link/button is provided)
description: Verifies that a user can follow the empty-state call-to-action to reach the Booking page.

steps.description: Click the "Transaction History" / "Riwayat Transaksi" navigation item
Click the empty-state button or link that mentions booking a consultation
